title: baissea ochrantha
intro: Baissea ochrantha, also known as the "forest violet", is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Baissea ochrantha include relief from fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Baissea ochrantha is typically prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and its herbal preparations have been used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
